Checkout page
- Look at the checkout page in a vacuum
- same principles that apply to a sales page, apply on
a checkout page
PROOF - CLARITY - SAFETY (show examples)
- PROOF - testimonials, studies, celeb endorsement,
trusted advisor endorsement, # of customers, recent
buyers, reviews Amazon style, Featured on media
logos
- CLARITY - tell them exactly what to do, make it
easy (confusion KILLS sales), FAQ to answer
questions, Live Chat/Phone
- SAFETY - is my order safe? Proof button, security
symbols (top, bottom, near CC info), Live chat/Phone
- Make your checkout page SO SIMPLE your 85 year
old grandmother could use it
- GOALS -make more sales
-push buyers to higher priced option
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 6 --

-save buyers trying to leave
-increase AOV with bump offers

g/index.php?AFID=1095&aff_sub=1356-2019726-s04
2c020T&trv=7mnt4qqywm6k__10661__1004
-
Things that work…
- Small header (or no header)
- Security symbols in the header (Norton)
- What’s “above the fold” matters most
- Order form top right/left side (above the fold)
- Pictures of the product
- Reviews/Testimonials
- FAQ
- Proof Gadget in corner
- Check marks after each form filled
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 6 --

- Forms should go straight up and down (not across)
- ONLY have forms you absolutely need (i.e. phone)
- Security symbols in header + near buttons + bottom
of page
- Exit pops (free shipping, trial offers)
- Bump sells (caution, MUST test these0
- cheap ones - added warranty $2.95
- physical version of digitial product
- audio version of ebook
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
